condition: The object is a flat circular annular rim with an open center area, not a filled circular plate. A concentric hollow collar is added at the middle and shares the same axis as the outer ring, with its center left open. Solid radial ribs run from the collar toward the outer rim, leaving rounded slot-like window spaces between them rather than surface markings. The added collar and rib web use shallower depth tiers than the main outer ring, so the part has stepped faces and underside relief instead of one uniform thickness.
note: Non-JSON CAD source wrapped as JSON.
